form.name: Name
form.bioPlaceholder: I help students master math and CS fundamentals.
form.avatarHint: Click avatar to upload a new image
form.blossomHint: Blossom server used to upload profile images. Get a free one at blossom.nostr.build

faq.dataStorage_a: All data is stored on Nostr relays as encrypted events. Your private key is encrypted with your master password and never leaves this device.
faq.whatIsRelay_a: A relay is a server that stores and forwards Nostr events. You can configure which relays to use in Settings.
faq.privateKeySafety_a: Your nsec (private key) is encrypted in your browser's local storage using your master password. It is never sent to any server.
faq.changeRole_a: Each npub is permanently bound to one role (tutor or student). To switch roles, create a new account.
faq.bookLesson_q: How do I book a lesson?
faq.bookLesson_a: Go to the Discover tab, find a tutor, select an available slot, and send a booking request.
faq.privateKey_a: It is your secret key that controls your Nostr identity. Anyone with access to your nsec can impersonate you, publish events, and access your encrypted messages. Never share it with anyone or paste it into untrusted websites. Store it in a password manager or write it down and keep it in a safe place.

about.title: About Tutorstr
about.description: Tutorstr is a decentralized tutoring platform built on the Nostr protocol. Identities, profiles, schedules, and agreements are all stored as Nostr events — no central server required.

student.dashboardIntro: Keep your public profile current so tutors can match you to the right lessons.
student.upcomingEmpty: No upcoming lessons yet — discover a tutor to book your first session.
